name: Antipas, Bishop of Pergamos in Asia
troparia: (Tone 4) You destroyed the lies of the idols, O Antipas,* and you smashed the hold of the devil.* You bravely professed Christ before the evil ones.* Now you have taken your place among angels* and offer up prayers to the Master,* giving thanks on our behalf and dispensing cures.* For this reason we venerate you, O martyred priest Antipas.* Beg Christ our God to save our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 4) You sat on the throne of the apostles* and you also adorned pastors.* Having been raised up in martyrdom, O blessed saint,* you shine like the sun in the sky.* You chase away the deep night of godlessness, O Antipas,* with the radiance of your beams.* For this we praise you as a heavenly martyred priest* and a source of health for us.
